subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! Verily, the Mahdi is God's guidance, and He guideth whomsoever He willeth. Thou canst not guide those who are in their graves. Verily, thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی ان المهدی هدی الله و هو یهدی من یشاء و ما انت بهادی من فی القبور انک
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
